title: Yang-Mills instanton on a four dimensional wormhole: asymptotic stability in the energy space
summary: In this paper we consider an $SU(2)$ Yang-Mills field propagating in the $4+1$ dimensional wormhole spacetime. Assuming the spherically symmetric magnetic ansatz the problem reduces to a one dimensional non linear wave equation. This equation posses a degree one solution (instanton) which is odd in space. We consider small, odd perturbations of the instanton and show that it is conditionally asymptotically stable in the odd energy space.

AI.tldr: 证明了4+1维虫洞时空中SU(2)杨-米尔斯场的瞬子解在奇性能量空间中的条件渐近稳定性
AI.motivation: 研究高维虫洞时空中规范场的动力学行为，特别是瞬子解的稳定性问题，这对于理解量子引力、弦理论中的拓扑结构以及规范场在非平凡时空背景下的行为具有重要意义
AI.techniques: 采用球对称磁ansatz将问题约化为一维非线性波动方程，分析奇性扰动，在奇性能量空间中建立条件渐近稳定性
AI.main_theorems: 证明了度数为1的瞬子解（空间奇性解）对于小的奇性扰动是条件渐近稳定的，即在奇性能量空间中，扰动不会导致解发散
AI.significance: 为高维虫洞时空中规范场的稳定性理论提供了重要结果，对拓扑孤子、瞬子物理以及弦理论中的膜动力学有理论意义，也为研究量子引力中的拓扑涨落提供了数学基础

title: Evolutionary equations with state-dependent delay
summary: We extend a contraction mapping argument for ordinary state-dependent delay differential equations to evolutionary partial differential equations in the sense of R. Picard, that is, to equations of the form $\bigl(\partial_{t} M(\partial_{t}) + A\bigr) u(t) = F\bigl(t,u_{(t)}\bigr)$, where $A$ is an $\mathrm{m}$-accretive (unbounded) linear operator and $M$ is a material law. We establish local well-posedness (in the sense of weak solutions) of generalized initial value problems that stem from a distributional formulation. We require prehistories in $H^{1}$ with bounded derivative, a regularity increasing right-hand side and a consistency condition. We showcase the viability of our results by applying them to classical examples (heat, wave and Maxwell's equations), examples from semigroup theory, port-Hamiltonian systems, as well as equations featuring fractional derivatives and convolutions (in time) with bounded operators.

AI.tldr: 将常微分方程状态依赖时滞的压缩映射方法推广到演化偏微分方程，建立了广义初值问题的局部适定性
AI.motivation: 研究背景是将常微分方程中处理状态依赖时滞的压缩映射方法推广到更广泛的演化偏微分方程框架中。核心问题是解决形如$(\partial_t M(\partial_t) + A)u(t) = F(t,u_{(t)})$的方程，其中$A$是m-增生线性算子，$M$是材料定律，$F$包含状态依赖时滞项
AI.techniques: 主要技术包括：压缩映射原理的推广、分布公式化方法、弱解理论、m-增生算子理论、材料定律框架、正则性提升技术、一致性条件分析
AI.main_theorems: 建立了广义初值问题的局部适定性（弱解意义），要求预历史在$H^1$空间中且导数有界，右端项具有正则性提升性质，并满足一致性条件
AI.significance: 理论意义在于统一处理了包含状态依赖时滞的演化偏微分方程，应用范围广泛，包括热方程、波动方程、Maxwell方程、半群理论、端口哈密顿系统、分数阶导数方程和含时间卷积的方程等

title: A strong quantitative form of the fractional isoperimetric inequality
summary: We show a strong version of the fractional quantitative isoperimetric inequality, in which the isoperimetric deficit controls not only the Fraenkel asymmetry but also a sort of oscillation of the boundary. This generalizes the local result by Fusco and Julin in \cite{FJ}. The proof follows a regularization process as in \cite{FJ} but it is quite different in its spirit. Then, as a consequence of the quantitative inequality, we prove some stability estimates for a fractional Cheeger inequality.

AI.tldr: 建立了分数阶等周不等式的强定量版本，将等周亏缺同时控制Frenkel不对称性和边界振荡
AI.motivation: 研究分数阶等周不等式的定量稳定性问题，推广Fusco和Julin的局部结果，旨在建立更精细的边界控制
AI.techniques: 采用正则化过程，但证明思路与Fusco-Julin方法不同，结合分数阶几何分析和变分方法
AI.main_theorems: 1. 分数阶等周不等式的强定量版本：等周亏缺同时控制Frenkel不对称性和边界振荡；2. 分数阶Cheeger不等式的稳定性估计
AI.significance: 推广了经典等周不等式的定量理论到分数阶情形，为分数阶几何分析提供新工具，在分数阶偏微分方程和几何变分问题中有重要应用

title: A Liouville theorem for convex functions with periodic Monge-Ampère measure
summary: Let $μ\not\equiv 0$ be a nonnegative locally finite periodic Borel measure on $\mathbb{R}^n$. We show that any convex solution to the Monge-Ampère equation \[ \det D^2 u = μ\quad \text{in } \mathbb{R}^n \] admits a unique decomposition (up to addition of constants) as the sum of a quadratic polynomial and a periodic function. This result extends, in full generality, the earlier works for the case $μ=f(x)\,\mathrm{d} x$: when $\log f \in C^α$, it was established by Caffarelli and Li; and when $\log f$ is merely bounded, it was proved by Li and Lu. Our result thus answers a question raised by Li and Lu. A key ingredient in the proof is a new dichotomous Harnack-type inequality for linearized Monge-Ampère equations with nonnegative periodic measures.

AI.tldr: 证明了任意非负局部有限周期测度下Monge-Ampère方程凸解的二次多项式加周期函数分解定理
AI.motivation: 研究Monge-Ampère方程在周期测度下的凸解结构，推广Caffarelli-Li和Li-Lu关于密度函数情形的结果，解决Li-Lu提出的公开问题
AI.techniques: 建立了线性化Monge-Ampère方程的二分类Harnack型不等式，处理非负周期测度情形，使用周期测度理论和凸分析技术
AI.main_theorems: 任意非负局部有限周期测度下Monge-Ampère方程凸解可唯一分解为二次多项式与周期函数之和（相差常数）
AI.significance: 完全解决了周期测度下Monge-Ampère方程解的结构问题，为更一般的测度理论提供了基础，扩展了经典结果的应用范围

title: An inverse problem in optimal transport on closed Riemannian manifolds
summary: We consider the problem of recovering the Riemannian metric on a compact closed manifold from the optimal transport maps when the underlying cost function is the squared Riemann distance. We show that the metric can be uniquely determined up to a multiplicative constant.

AI.tldr: 证明了在紧致闭流形上，通过最优输运映射可以唯一确定黎曼度量（相差一个常数因子）。
AI.motivation: 研究黎曼几何与最优输运理论的交叉问题，探讨如何从最优输运映射中恢复流形的几何结构，特别是黎曼度量。
AI.techniques: 结合最优输运理论、黎曼几何和偏微分方程方法，利用平方黎曼距离作为成本函数，分析最优输运映射与度量的关系。
AI.main_theorems: 证明了在紧致闭流形上，当成本函数为平方黎曼距离时，最优输运映射可以唯一确定黎曼度量（相差一个常数因子）。
AI.significance: 建立了最优输运与黎曼几何之间的重要联系，为从输运数据中恢复几何结构提供了理论基础，在几何逆问题和数据科学中有潜在应用。

title: The existence and instability of blowing-up steady states for the Shigesada-Kawasaki-Teramoto competition model with cross-diffusion
summary: We investigate the existence and instability of a class of blowing-up positive steady states arising in a shadow system of the Shigesada-Kawasaki-Teramoto (SKT) two-species competition model, as well as in the corresponding perturbed SKT model with a sufficiently large cross-diffusion coefficient and bounded random diffusion parameters. In their classical work (Lou-Ni, 1999), it was shown that, under the limit where one cross-diffusion parameter tends to infinity, coexistence steady states of the SKT model are characterized by three types of shadow systems. In a previous study (Kuto, 2015), the first author analyzed one of these shadow systems in one space dimension (the second shadow system) and proved that a component of a bifurcating branch blows up as the bifurcation parameter approaches the first positive Neumann eigenvalue of $-Δ$. In the present paper, using a new approach based on suitable transformations and the Lyapunov-Schmidt reduction method, we derive the existence and detailed asymptotic structure of several branches of positive steady states near blow-up points for shadow systems with one or two cross-diffusion terms, in both one- and multi-dimensional domains. We further show that all such large-amplitude steady state branches are spectrally unstable. Moreover, by means of perturbation arguments, we establish the existence and instability of corresponding branches of perturbed positive steady states for the original SKT model when one cross-diffusion coefficient is sufficiently large.

AI.tldr: 证明了SKT竞争模型阴影系统中爆破正稳态解的存在性、渐近结构和谱不稳定性，并将结果推广到原始SKT模型
AI.motivation: 研究SKT两物种竞争模型中，当交叉扩散系数趋于无穷时，阴影系统产生的爆破正稳态解的存在性和不稳定性问题，这是对Lou-Ni(1999)和Kuto(2015)工作的深入拓展
AI.techniques: 采用新的变换方法和Lyapunov-Schmidt约化技术，结合扰动论证，分析爆破点附近的稳态分支结构和谱稳定性
AI.main_theorems: 建立了阴影系统中多个爆破正稳态分支的存在性、详细渐近结构及其谱不稳定性；通过扰动论证将结果推广到原始SKT模型，证明当交叉扩散系数足够大时，相应扰动正稳态分支的存在性和不稳定性
AI.significance: 深化了对SKT模型中交叉扩散诱导的爆破现象的理解，为交叉扩散系统的稳态解结构和稳定性分析提供了新的理论框架和方法

title: Global Gevrey solution of 3D anisotropic Navier-Stokes system in a strip domain
summary: We investigate the three-dimensional (3D) incompressible anisotropic Navier-Stokes system with dissipation only in the horizontal variables, posed in a strip domain. To overcome the difficulties arising from the boundary terms and the absence of vertical dissipation, we impose a Gevrey-class regularity condition in the vertical direction. For the remaining directions, we prove that the solution exhibits space-time analytic or Gevrey-class regularization. Furthermore, the solution is shown to possess an enhanced Gevrey regularity in the direction of strong diffusion, which is unconstrained by boundaries.

AI.tldr: 证明了三维各向异性不可压Navier-Stokes方程在水平耗散、垂直无耗散且垂直方向具有Gevrey正则性的条件下，解具有时空解析或Gevrey类正则化性质
AI.motivation: 研究三维不可压各向异性Navier-Stokes系统，该系统仅在水平方向有耗散，垂直方向无耗散，且定义在带状区域。主要困难来自边界项和垂直方向缺乏耗散，通过施加垂直方向的Gevrey类正则性条件来克服这些困难
AI.techniques: 使用Gevrey类正则性理论，结合各向异性耗散结构分析；处理边界项的技术；在强扩散方向（水平方向）证明增强的Gevrey正则性
AI.main_theorems: 1. 解在剩余方向（水平方向）具有时空解析或Gevrey类正则化；2. 解在强扩散方向（水平方向）具有增强的Gevrey正则性，且不受边界约束
AI.significance: 为各向异性Navier-Stokes方程的正则性理论提供了新结果，特别是在部分方向缺乏耗散的情况下；证明了Gevrey类正则性在克服边界困难和缺乏垂直耗散问题中的有效性；对理解流体方程的正则化机制有重要意义

title: Normalized solutions to subcritical Choquard systems with double couplings
summary:
We consider the Choquard system with both linear and nonlinear couplings
  $-Δu + μ_1 u =λ_1 ( I_α* |u|^{r_1} ) |u|^{r_1-2} u + βp( I_α* |v|^q)|u|^{p-2} u + κv,$
  $-Δv + μ_2 v =λ_2 ( I_α* |v|^{r_2} ) |v|^{r_2-2} v + βq( I_α* |u|^p)|v|^{q-2} v + κu , $
  $\int_{\mathbb{R}^N} u^2 = ρ_1^2\, , \int_{\mathbb{R}^N} v^2 = ρ_2^2,$ where $N \in \{3,4\}$, $λ_1, λ_2, β, κ, ρ_1,ρ_2 > 0$, $2_{α,*} :=\frac{N+α}{N} <p,q , r_1, r_2 <2_α^*:=\frac{N+α}{N-2}$ and $p+q\leq 2r_1 \leq 2r_2$ . We investigate a classification result as the parameters $p+q$, $2r_1$ and $2r_2$ vary across the ranges $(\frac{2N+2α}{N},\frac{2N+2α+4}{N})$,
  $\{\frac{2N+2α+4}{N}\}$, and $(\frac{2N+2α+4}{N},\frac{2N+2α}{N-2})$. Employing variational methods, we demonstrate the existence of a normalized ground state for the system in the mass subcritical, critical, and supercritical cases.

AI.tldr: 研究了具有线性和非线性耦合的Choquard系统的归一化基态解存在性分类
AI.motivation: 研究具有线性和非线性耦合的Choquard系统，该系统包含Riesz势的非局部项和L^2质量约束条件，旨在在质量次临界、临界和超临界情况下建立归一化基态解的存在性分类
AI.techniques: 变分方法，包括约束极小化、Pohozaev恒等式、紧性分析，以及参数在特定范围内变化时的分类分析
AI.main_theorems: 证明了当参数p+q、2r₁和2r₂在三个不同区间变化时，系统存在归一化基态解：质量次临界情况(p+q, 2r₁, 2r₂ ∈ (2N+2α/N, 2N+2α+4/N))、临界情况(等于2N+2α+4/N)和超临界情况(∈ (2N+2α+4/N, 2N+2α/(N-2)))
AI.significance: 扩展了Choquard系统的归一化解理论，提供了完整的参数分类，对非局部椭圆系统和约束变分问题的研究有重要意义

title: Pseudo-magnetic Fields and Effective Dynamics in Strained Honeycomb Structures
comment: 46 pages, 6 figures. Submitted to a journal
summary: Strain offers a straightforward and effective method for generating pseudo-magnetic fields in optical and acoustic materials, thereby enabling precise manipulation of wave propagation. In this article, we investigate and justify wave packet dynamics localized near Dirac points in strained honeycomb-structured media. We develop a novel approach based on spectral analysis to control the error from second-order differential residue terms caused by the strain. The analysis yields a two-dimensional Dirac equation with nontrivial gauge fields governing the envelope dynamics, which is proved to well approximate the true solution in a long but finite time. These results contribute to the mathematical understanding of pseudo-magnetic effects in strained honeycomb structures and pave the way to systems with general higher-order perturbation terms.

AI.tldr: 提出基于谱分析的新方法，证明应变诱导的赝磁场下狄拉克点附近波包动力学可由带非平凡规范场的二维狄拉克方程精确描述。
AI.motivation: 应变是光学和声学材料中产生赝磁场的直接有效方法，能精确操控波传播。研究应变蜂窝结构中狄拉克点附近的波包动力学，为理解赝磁效应提供数学基础。
AI.techniques: 基于谱分析的新方法，控制应变引起的二阶微分残差项误差，证明带规范场的狄拉克方程在有限长时间内精确近似真实解。
AI.main_theorems: 推导出带非平凡规范场的二维狄拉克方程控制包络动力学，证明该方程在有限长时间内能良好近似真实解，为高阶扰动项系统奠定基础。
AI.significance: 深化应变蜂窝结构中赝磁效应的数学理解，为处理一般高阶扰动项系统开辟道路，对波操控和拓扑材料设计有重要意义。

title: Sharp $L^4$ Strichartz estimate for Hyperbolic Schrödinger equation on $\mathbb{R}\times \mathbb{T}$
summary: We prove the sharp $L^4$ Strichartz estimate without derivative loss for the hyperbolic Schrödinger equation on $\mathbb{R}\times\mathbb{T}$, \begin{equation} \|e^{it (\partial_{x_{1}}^2-\partial_{x_{2}}^2)} φ\|_{L^4_{t,x_{1},x_{2}}([0,1]\times \mathbb{R} \times \mathbb{T})}\lesssim \|φ\|_{L_{x_{1},x_{2}}^2(\mathbb{R} \times \mathbb{T})}, \end{equation} which serves as the hyperbolic analogue of the classical result of Takaoka-Tzvetkov \cite{takaoka20012d}. The proof is based on the combination of a robust kernel decomposition method with precise measure estimates for semi-algebraic sets. As an immediate application, we establish the global well-posedness for the cubic hyperbolic Schrödinger equation on $\mathbb{R}\times\mathbb{T}$ in the $L^2$-critical space with sufficiently small initial data.

AI.tldr: 证明了双曲薛定谔方程在$\mathbb{R}\times\mathbb{T}$上的无导数损失的尖锐$L^4$ Strichartz估计
AI.motivation: 研究双曲薛定谔方程的Strichartz估计，这是经典Takaoka-Tzvetkov结果的双曲类比，旨在建立混合域上的调和分析理论
AI.techniques: 结合鲁棒的核分解方法与半代数集的精确测度估计，发展了混合域上的调和分析技术
AI.main_theorems: 证明了双曲薛定谔方程在$\mathbb{R}\times\mathbb{T}$上的尖锐$L^4$ Strichartz估计，并应用该结果建立了三次双曲薛定谔方程在$L^2$临界空间中的全局适定性
AI.significance: 扩展了Strichartz估计理论到双曲算子情形，为混合域上的非线性发展方程研究提供了新工具，具有重要的调和分析意义

title: Finite time blow-up analysis for the generalized Proudman-Johnson model
summary: In this paper, we study the generalized Proudman-Johnson equation posed on the torus. In the critical regime where the parameter $a$ is close to and slightly greater than 1, we establish finite time blow-up of smooth solutions to the inviscid case. Moreover, we show that the blow-up is asymptotically self-similar for a class of smooth initial data. In contrast, when the parameter $a$ lies slightly below 1, we prove the global in time existence for the same initial data. In addition, we demonstrate that inviscid Proudman-Johnson equation with Hölder continuous data also develops a self-similar blow-up. Finally, for the viscous case with $a>1$, we prove that smooth initial data can still lead to finite time blow-up.

AI.tldr: 在临界参数a≈1附近，建立了广义Proudman-Johnson方程在环面上光滑解有限时间爆破与全局存在性的精确阈值
AI.motivation: 研究广义Proudman-Johnson方程在临界参数区域a≈1附近的解行为，探索光滑解爆破与全局存在性的精确阈值条件
AI.techniques: 自相似分析、渐近匹配、爆破理论、全局存在性证明、Hölder连续数据处理
AI.main_theorems: 1) a>1且接近1时无粘性情形光滑解有限时间爆破；2) 爆破是渐近自相似的；3) a<1且接近1时相同初值全局存在；4) Hölder连续初值也产生自相似爆破；5) a>1时粘性情形光滑初值仍可导致有限时间爆破
AI.significance: 揭示了Proudman-Johnson方程临界参数区域的精确爆破阈值，为理解此类流体力学方程的奇异性形成机制提供了重要理论依据

title: Singularity formation for the supersonic inward wave of compressible Euler equations with radial symmetry
summary: In this paper, we consider the singularity formation of smooth solutions for the compressible radially symmetric Euler equations. By applying the characteristic method and the invariant domain idea, we show that, for polytropic ideal gases with $γ\geq3$, the smooth solution develops a singularity in finite time for a class of initial supersonic inward waves.

AI.tldr: 证明了对于γ≥3的多方理想气体，一类初始超音速内向波的光滑解会在有限时间内形成奇点
AI.motivation: 研究可压缩径向对称欧拉方程光滑解的奇点形成问题，特别是多方理想气体在特定初始条件下的奇异性发展
AI.techniques: 特征线方法和不变域思想，结合径向对称性分析
AI.main_theorems: 对于γ≥3的多方理想气体，存在一类初始超音速内向波，使得光滑解在有限时间内必然形成奇点
AI.significance: 深化了对可压缩欧拉方程奇点形成机制的理解，特别是对多方理想气体在特定参数范围内的奇异性行为提供了严格数学证明

title: Well-posedness and time-asymptotic of Boltzmann equations for monatomic and polyatomic mixtures
summary: This paper considers a system of Boltzmann equations modelling the mixture of monatomic and polyatomic gases in an $L^{2}-L^{\infty}$ perturbation theory around global modified Maxwellians accounting for the internal energy of the mixture in the whole space and the torus. We investigate the pointwise decay in velocity and internal energy of the linearized Boltzmann operators in the four types of collisions. A novel approach is developed to deal with the additional internal energy variable $I\in \mathbb{R}_+$ and the loss of symmetry due to dissimilar masses of the mixture components. Subsequently, we carry out a classical $L^2-L^\infty$ method to establish the well-posedness theory of the system. The optimal polynomial time decay rate on the whole space is obtained accordingly based on the spatial Fourier's study of the linearized system. The analysis shows the structure of a perturbed Euler-type model for the solution's macroscopic quantities: density, bulk velocity, and temperature, near the steady state, which gives a potential application to investigate fluid limit problems. In addition, this work proves exponential time decay in the torus and fills the gap of classical multi-species Boltzmann in the whole space.

AI.tldr: 本文建立了单原子与多原子气体混合Boltzmann方程在全局修正Maxwellian附近的适定性理论，获得了最优多项式时间衰减率，并揭示了宏观量的扰动Euler型结构。
AI.motivation: 研究单原子与多原子气体混合的Boltzmann方程系统，解决传统多物种Boltzmann方程在全空间中的理论空白，同时处理混合物中不同质量组分导致的对称性缺失和内部能量变量的数学挑战。
AI.techniques: 发展了处理内部能量变量I∈ℝ⁺的新方法，采用L²-L∞摄动理论，通过空间Fourier分析研究线性化系统，使用经典的L²-L∞方法建立适定性理论。
AI.main_theorems: 建立了系统在全局修正Maxwellian附近的适定性理论；获得了全空间中的最优多项式时间衰减率；证明了环面上的指数时间衰减；揭示了宏观量（密度、整体速度、温度）的扰动Euler型结构。
AI.significance: 填补了经典多物种Boltzmann方程在全空间的理论空白，为研究流体极限问题提供了潜在应用，发展了处理内部能量变量和不对称质量混合物的新数学方法。

title: On approximation theorems for solutions to strongly parabolic systems in anisotropic Sobolev spaces
summary: We investigate the problem on Runge pairs for Sobolev solutions of strongly uniformly parabolic systems in non-cylindrical domains of a special kind. We prove that if the coefficients of a parabolic operator are constant, then two domains with sufficiently smooth boundaries, no parts of which are parallel to the plane $t=0$, form a Runge pair if and only if the complements of any section of the larger domain to the section of the smaller domain by planes $t = const$, have no compact components in the larger section.

AI.tldr: 证明了常系数强一致抛物系统在非柱形区域中Runge对的充要条件
AI.motivation: 研究非柱形区域中抛物系统的Runge对问题，这是椭圆方程Runge性质在抛物情形下的推广，具有重要的理论和应用价值
AI.techniques: 使用抛物算子理论、非柱形区域分析、截面几何方法，以及抛物方程的唯一延拓性质
AI.main_theorems: 证明了常系数强一致抛物系统中，两个边界充分光滑且不与t=0平面平行的区域构成Runge对的充要条件是：对于任意常数t截面，较大区域截面减去较小区域截面的补集在较大截面中没有紧支连通分支
AI.significance: 为抛物系统的近似理论提供了理论基础，建立了抛物情形下Runge对的几何刻画，对控制理论、反问题和数值分析有重要应用

title: Solving Newell-Whitehead-Segel and Allen-Cahn Equations Employing Physics-Informed Neural Networks: A Comparative Analysis with Spline Methods
summary: This study focuses on the solution of partial differential equations (PDEs) by using physics-informed neural networks (PINNs). The Newell-Whitehead-Segel (NWS) equation and the Allen-Cahn equation belong to fundamental PDEs used mostly in various scientific disciplines. Different methods, including analytical and numerical approaches, have been proposed for solving these equations alongside the recently introduced PINN method. This study provides a detailed and comprehensive comparison between the developed PINN method and the state-of-the-art spline numerical solution for the NWS and Allen-Cahn equation. Furthermore, the computational time of the trained PINN models is evaluated to determine their computational efficiency. The findings show that PINN is significantly better than spline methods in solving both problems.

AI.tldr: 比较PINN方法与样条数值方法在求解NWS方程和Allen-Cahn方程中的性能，发现PINN方法显著优于样条方法
AI.motivation: NWS方程和Allen-Cahn方程是多个科学领域中的基本偏微分方程，传统解析和数值方法存在局限性，需要评估新兴的PINN方法与传统数值方法的性能差异
AI.techniques: 物理信息神经网络（PINN）方法，样条数值方法，计算时间评估，性能比较分析
AI.main_theorems: PINN方法在求解NWS方程和Allen-Cahn方程时显著优于样条数值方法，具有更好的计算效率和精度
AI.significance: 为偏微分方程求解提供了PINN方法优于传统数值方法的实证证据，推动了机器学习方法在科学计算中的应用，对计算数学和科学计算领域有重要影响

title: On the Long Time Existence of a Fractional KdV-BBM Type Equation
summary: We consider a fractional Korteweg de Vries-Benjamin Bona Mahony (KdV-BBM) type equation including both fractional dispersive terms of fractional KdV and fractional BBM equations. We aim to enhance the existence time of solutions with small initial data $|| u_0||_{H^{N+α/2}}= ε$ from $\frac{1}ε$ to $\frac{1}{ε^2}$. The proof relies on the combination of a modified energy method with Fourier techniques. In addition, the long time existence issues are investigated numerically. Numerical observations of the lifespan give an evidence of existence of solutions beyond the hyperbolic time scale. This study provides a detailed analysis from both analytical and numerical aspects for the existence of smooth solutions.

AI.tldr: 通过改进能量方法与傅里叶技术相结合，将分数阶KdV-BBM方程小初值解的存在时间从1/ε提升到1/ε²
AI.motivation: 研究分数阶Korteweg de Vries-Benjamin Bona Mahony (KdV-BBM) 类型方程，该方程同时包含分数阶KdV和分数阶BBM方程的色散项。目标是解决小初值条件下解的存在时间问题，将存在时间从1/ε量级提升到1/ε²量级。
AI.techniques: 结合改进的能量方法（modified energy method）与傅里叶技术（Fourier techniques），同时通过数值方法研究长时间存在性问题。
AI.main_theorems: 证明了对于小初值条件（||u₀||_{H^{N+α/2}} = ε），解的存在时间可以从1/ε提升到1/ε²；数值观察显示解的存在时间可以超越双曲时间尺度。
AI.significance: 为分数阶KdV-BBM方程提供了从解析和数值两个方面的详细分析，显著改进了小初值解的存在时间估计，对理解非线性波动方程的长时间行为有重要理论意义。

title: Global Existence for Coupled 3-D Nonlinear Wave and Klein-Gordon Equations with Large Derivatives of Initial Data
summary: We consider the Cauchy problem of coupled 3-D wave and Klein-Gordon equations with a quadratic form of nonlinearity. We show global existence under several conditions, including large derivative data for wave equations and the null conditions.

AI.tldr: 证明了三维耦合波动方程与Klein-Gordon方程在二次非线性项和零条件假设下的全局存在性
AI.motivation: 研究三维空间中耦合波动方程和Klein-Gordon方程的Cauchy问题，这类方程组在相对论场论和数学物理中具有重要应用，特别关注二次非线性项和零条件对解全局存在性的影响
AI.techniques: 利用零条件结构、能量估计、时空加权估计、双曲型方程的全局存在性理论，以及处理大初值导数数据的特殊方法
AI.main_theorems: 在满足零条件和若干其他条件下，证明了耦合系统在三维空间中的全局解存在性，即使波动方程具有大导数初值
AI.significance: 扩展了双曲型方程全局存在性理论，为处理耦合波动-Klein-Gordon系统提供了新的数学框架，在数学物理和相对论场论中有重要应用价值

title: A Wave Front Tracking Scheme for Flux Reconstruction in $2\times 2$ Hyperbolic Conservation Laws
summary: This paper introduces a novel wave front tracking framework for reconstructing unknown flux functions in $2\times 2$ hyperbolic conservation laws, extending beyond the well-studied scalar case. By analyzing Riemann solutions at fixed observation times, we develop explicit reconstruction formulas that handle arbitrary combinations of shock and rarefaction waves through a unified equivalent shock concept. Our method constructs piecewise quadratic $C^1$ flux approximations with rigorous convergence guarantees: the approximation errors decrease quadratically with the discretization parameters for function values and linearly for derivatives under $C^{1,1}$ regularity, with enhanced cubic and quadratic convergence respectively under $C^3$ regularity. Applications to the isentropic Euler equations and the mathematically equivalent p-system in compressible fluid dynamics demonstrate the method's capability to identify complete equations of state from limited dynamic measurements, providing a systematic approach to a fundamental inverse problem in continuum mechanics.

AI.tldr: 提出了一个用于重建2×2双曲守恒律中未知通量函数的新颖波前追踪框架
AI.motivation: 研究双曲守恒律中的基本逆问题：从有限的动态测量中重建未知的通量函数，扩展了标量情况下的已有研究，应用于等熵欧拉方程和p-系统等连续介质力学问题
AI.techniques: 波前追踪框架、黎曼解分析、统一等效激波概念、分段二次C¹通量逼近、显式重建公式
AI.main_theorems: 建立了具有严格收敛保证的分段二次C¹通量逼近：在C^{1,1}正则性下，函数值的逼近误差随离散参数二次递减，导数的误差线性递减；在C³正则性下，收敛速度分别提升为三次和二次
AI.significance: 为连续介质力学中的基本逆问题提供了系统方法，能够从有限动态测量中识别完整的物态方程，扩展了双曲守恒律逆问题研究的理论框架

title: Normalized Solutions for the $(2,q)$-Laplacian Operator Between Mass-Critical Exponents
summary: This paper concerns the existence of normalized solutions to a class of $(2,q)$-Laplacian equations with a power type nonlinearity in the intermediate regime between the two mass critical exponents $2(1+2/N)$, $q(1+2/N)$. More precisely, we prove the existence of solutions with negative energy obtained through a global minimization procedure, and of solutions with positive energy established via a local minimization technique and a mountain-pass argument. Furthermore, we derive both existence and nonexistence results for the zero-mass case $λ= 0$, highlighting the role of the mixed diffusion in determining the qualitative behavior of solutions. Specifically, this paper's novelty lies in providing a comprehensive understanding of the intermediate cases that arise when the non-homogeneous $(2,q)$-Laplacian operator appears. Our analysis combines variational methods, compactness arguments, and delicate energy estimates adapted to the nonhomogeneous nature of the $(2,q)$-Laplacian operator.

AI.tldr: 证明了(2,q)-Laplacian方程在中间质量临界指数区间内归一化解的存在性，包括负能量全局最小化解和正能量局部最小化/山路解。
AI.motivation: 研究(2,q)-Laplacian方程在质量临界指数2(1+2/N)和q(1+2/N)之间的中间区域中归一化解的存在性问题，这类非齐次算子混合了线性和非线性扩散效应。
AI.techniques: 变分方法、紧性论证、精细的能量估计，结合全局最小化、局部最小化和山路引理技术，特别处理了(2,q)-Laplacian算子的非齐次特性。
AI.main_theorems: 1) 通过全局最小化得到负能量归一化解的存在性；2) 通过局部最小化和山路引理得到正能量归一化解的存在性；3) 零质量情况(λ=0)下解的存在性和不存在性结果。
AI.significance: 首次全面理解了(2,q)-Laplacian算子中间区域的行为，揭示了混合扩散对解定性行为的影响，为非齐次算子理论提供了新见解。

title: The Rabinowitz continuum of subcritical Gelfand problems and free boundary-type equations arising in plasma physics
summary: The qualitative behavior of the Rabinowitz unbounded continuum of subcritical Gelfand problems is well known on balls in any dimension. We don't know of any such sharp and detailed description otherwise, which is our motivation to look for a new approach to the problem. The underlying idea is to describe solutions of Gelfand problems via suitably defined constrained problems of free boundary-type arising in plasma physics and to replace the usual $L^\infty$ norm of the solution with the energy of the plasma. Toward this goal, we first solve a long standing open problem of independent interest about the uniqueness of solutions of Grad-Shafranov type equations. Thus, we exploit these unique solutions to detect a curve containing both minimal and non minimal solutions of the associated Gelfand problem. In other words we come up with a new global parametrization of the Rabinowitz continuum, the monotonicity of the energy along the branch providing a meaningful generalization of the classical pointwise monotonicity property of minimal solutions, suitable to describe non minimal solutions as well. On a ball in any dimension, we come up as expected with a bell-shaped profile of the full branch of solutions of the Gelfand problem.

AI.tldr: 通过等离子体物理中的自由边界问题新方法，建立了Gelfand问题Rabinowitz连续统的全局参数化，并解决了Grad-Shafranov型方程唯一性的长期开放问题。
AI.motivation: Gelfand问题的Rabinowitz无界连续统在球域上的定性行为已清楚，但其他情况下缺乏精确描述，需要新方法来全局描述解的分支结构。
AI.techniques: 将Gelfand问题转化为等离子体物理中的自由边界型约束问题，用等离子体能量替代传统的L∞范数，并利用Grad-Shafranov型方程的唯一性解。
AI.main_theorems: 解决了Grad-Shafranov型方程唯一性的长期开放问题；建立了包含Gelfand问题最小解和非最小解的曲线；给出了Rabinowitz连续统的新全局参数化。
AI.significance: 为Gelfand问题提供了新的分析框架，将点态单调性推广为能量单调性，适用于描述非最小解，在任意维球域上得到完整的钟形解分支结构。

title: Optimizing Resource Distribution in a One-Dimensional Logistic Diffusion Model
summary: In this article, we study the optimization of resource distributions in a one-dimensional logistic diffusive model. The goal is to determine a distribution on a bounded one-dimensional domain that maximizes the total population at equilibrium. Previous works have shown that optimal resources are bang-bang, and in one dimension, a sufficiently large dispersal rate forces the optimal resource to be concentrated. For general dispersal rates, however, the analysis becomes more difficult because the equilibrium population may behave irregularly, and the optimal resource may be fragmented. To address this, we introduce a block decomposition that reduces fragmented resources to a collection of concentrated blocks. We then define an advantage function, which measures the gain in the equilibrium population obtained by allocating resources on a fixed interval and is used to analyze the contribution of each block to the total population. This function also allows us to reformulate the optimization problem as a convexity analysis of the advantage function. We prove the superlinearity of this function when the total resource is small enough, and this property leads to an explicit characterization of the optimal control with sufficiently small total resource.

AI.tldr: 提出一种块分解方法和优势函数，用于分析一维扩散Logistic模型中资源分布优化问题，并在总资源足够小时给出最优控制的显式刻画。
AI.motivation: 研究一维有界区域上Logistic扩散模型中资源分布的最优化问题，目标是最大化平衡态总种群数量。先前工作表明最优资源分布是bang-bang型，且在一维情况下，足够大的扩散率会迫使最优资源集中分布。但对于一般扩散率，平衡态种群行为可能不规则，最优资源可能呈现碎片化分布，这增加了分析难度。
AI.techniques: 引入块分解方法将碎片化资源简化为集中块的集合；定义优势函数来衡量在固定区间上分配资源对平衡态种群的增益，用于分析每个块对总种群的贡献；将优化问题转化为优势函数的凸性分析；证明当总资源足够小时优势函数的超线性性质。
AI.main_theorems: 证明了当总资源足够小时优势函数具有超线性性质；这一性质导致了对足够小总资源情况下最优控制的显式刻画。
AI.significance: 为解决一般扩散率下资源分布优化问题提供了新的分析框架，将复杂的碎片化资源分布问题转化为更易处理的块分解和凸性分析，对生态学中的资源分配优化和种群动力学研究具有理论意义。

title: Asymptotic stability of planar entropy wave for 3-d Navier-Stokes equations in Eulerian coordinates
summary: We investigate the large-time asymptotic behavior toward the planar entropy wave for the three-dimensional Navier-Stokes equations in Eulerian coordinates, considering two types of initial perturbations -- with and without the assumption that the integral of the initial perturbation is zero. Generic perturbations generate diffusion waves, and structural conditions fail for multi-dimensional Navier-Stokes equations in Eulerian coordinates. These two aspects have posed significant challenges and left the problem unresolved for years. On one hand, since \cite{LX}, the study of the entropy wave has been based on the left-right structural conditions. Without these structural conditions, the decay rates of lower-order terms become too slow to close the {\it a priori} assumption. On the other hand, the presence of diffusion waves yields problematic error terms in the perturbation system. In this work, we introduce a new transformation to ensure that both left-right structural conditions hold for the perturbation system. Additionally, using the fact that the derivative of the entropy wave maintains a fixed sign, we employ well-designed weighted energy estimates to control the slowly decaying terms. This enables us to establish asymptotic stability and derive the optimal decay rate. Furthermore, we address the case of initial perturbations with the zero mass condition and obtain the optimal decay rate by additionally developing a Poincaré type inequality and a key cancellation.

AI.tldr: 通过引入新变换和加权能量估计，解决了三维Navier-Stokes方程中熵波渐近稳定性问题，克服了无结构条件和扩散波带来的长期挑战。
AI.motivation: 研究三维Navier-Stokes方程在Euler坐标下熵波的大时间渐近行为，解决两个核心挑战：一是多维Navier-Stokes方程在Euler坐标下结构条件失效，导致低阶项衰减过慢；二是扩散波在扰动系统中产生问题误差项，这些问题多年来一直未解决。
AI.techniques: 引入新变换确保扰动系统满足左右结构条件；利用熵波导数符号固定特性，设计加权能量估计控制慢衰减项；对零质量初始扰动情况，发展Poincaré型不等式和关键抵消技巧。
AI.main_theorems: 建立了熵波的渐近稳定性，获得了最优衰减率；分别处理了有无零质量条件的初始扰动情况；克服了结构条件失效和扩散波带来的技术障碍。
AI.significance: 解决了多年来未解决的多维Navier-Stokes方程熵波渐近稳定性问题，为处理无结构条件的流体方程提供了新方法，对理解流体大时间行为有重要理论意义。

title: On Moffatt's magnetic relaxation for 2D and 2.5D flows
summary: We study the Moffatt's magnetic relaxation equation with Darcy-type regularization for the constitutive law. This is a topology-preserving dissipative equation, whose solutions are conjectured to converge in the infinite time limit towards equilibria of the incompressible Euler equations. Our goal is to prove this conjectured property for various equilibria in various domains. The first result concerns a class of non-constant shear flows in a 2D periodic channel. In the second result, by adopting a geometric approach, we address a class of 2.5D equilibria in $Ω\times \mathbb{R}$, where $Ω\subset \mathbb{R}^2$ can be a periodic channel or any bounded domain.

AI.tldr: 证明了Moffatt磁弛豫方程在无限时间极限下收敛于不可压缩欧拉方程平衡态的两个结果
AI.motivation: 研究Moffatt磁弛豫方程（带Darcy型正则化）的长时间行为，该方程是拓扑保持的耗散方程，其解被推测在无限时间极限下收敛于不可压缩欧拉方程的平衡态
AI.techniques: 采用几何方法分析2.5D平衡态；对于2D周期通道中的非恒定剪切流使用特定分析技术
AI.main_theorems: 1. 2D周期通道中一类非恒定剪切流的收敛性结果；2. 在Ω×ℝ（Ω⊂ℝ²可以是周期通道或有界区域）中一类2.5D平衡态的收敛性结果
AI.significance: 为Moffatt磁弛豫方程的收敛性猜想提供了严格数学证明，建立了磁弛豫过程与欧拉方程平衡态之间的联系，对理解拓扑保持耗散系统的长时间行为有重要意义

title: On the optimal local well-posedness of the wave kinetic equation in $L^r$
summary: In this paper, we give a unified treatment of the local well-posedness for the wave kinetic equation in almost critical weighted $L^r$ spaces with $2 \leq r \leq \infty.$ The proof builds on ideas from our earlier works \cite{AmLe24, AmLemain25}. Our approach is based solely on kinetic tools, with no appeal to Fourier theory.

AI.tldr: 在几乎临界的加权L^r空间(2≤r≤∞)中建立了波动力学方程局部适定性的统一理论
AI.motivation: 波动力学方程是描述波湍流统计行为的重要模型，研究其在加权L^r空间中的局部适定性问题，特别是几乎临界空间中的适定性，对于理解方程解的长期行为具有重要意义
AI.techniques: 基于作者前期工作的思想，完全使用动力学工具而不依赖傅里叶理论，在几乎临界的加权L^r空间中建立统一处理框架
AI.main_theorems: 证明了波动力学方程在加权L^r空间(2≤r≤∞)中的局部适定性，覆盖了从L^2到L^∞的整个范围，特别是在几乎临界空间中的适定性结果
AI.significance: 提供了波动力学方程适定性理论的统一框架，完全基于动力学方法而不依赖傅里叶分析，为研究波湍流统计理论提供了新的数学工具，对理解非线性波相互作用的长期行为有重要意义

title: Kinetic and mean-field modeling of muscular dystrophies
summary: We present a new class of models for assessing the cell dynamics characterising muscular dystrophies. The proposed approach comprises a system of integro-differential equations for the statistical distributions, over a large patient cohort, of the densities of muscle fibers and immune cells implicated in muscle inflammation, degeneration, and regeneration, which underpin disease development. Considering an appropriately scaled version of this model, we formally derive, as the corresponding mean-field limit, a system of Fokker-Planck equations, from which we subsequently derive, as a macroscopic model counterpart, a system of differential equations for the mean densities of muscle and immune cells in the cohort of patients and the related variances. Then, we study long-time asymptotics for the mean-field model by determining the quasi-equilibrium cell distribution functions, which are in the form of probability density functions of inverse Gamma distributions, and proving the long-time convergence to such quasi-equilibrium distributions. The analytical results obtained are illustrated by means of a sample of results of numerical simulations. The modeling approach presented here has the potential to offer new insights into the balance between degeneration and regeneration mechanisms in the progression of muscular dystrophies, and provides a basis for future extensions, including the modeling of therapeutic interventions.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种基于积分-微分方程的统计分布模型，用于分析肌肉萎缩症中肌肉纤维和免疫细胞的群体动力学。
AI.motivation: 研究肌肉萎缩症中肌肉纤维退化、炎症和再生过程的细胞动力学，建立能够描述患者群体中细胞分布统计特征的数学模型。
AI.techniques: 使用积分-微分方程系统描述统计分布，通过尺度分析推导平均场极限的Fokker-Planck方程，进而得到宏观的均值-方差微分方程系统，并分析长时间渐近行为。
AI.main_theorems: 建立了从微观统计模型到宏观平均场模型的数学推导框架，证明了长时间收敛到拟平衡分布（逆Gamma分布形式），并确定了细胞分布的准平衡状态。
AI.significance: 为理解肌肉萎缩症中退化与再生机制的平衡提供了新的数学框架，为未来治疗干预建模奠定了基础，将统计物理方法应用于生物医学问题。

title: A Green's function approach to linearized Monge-Ampère equations in divergence form and application to singular Abreu type equations
summary: In this paper, we establish local and global regularity estimates for linearized Monge-Ampère equations in divergence form via critical Lorentz space estimates for the Green's function of the linearized Monge-Ampère operator and its gradient. These estimates hold under suitable conditions on the data and the convex Monge-Ampère potential is assumed to have Hessian determinant bounded between two positive constants. As an application, we obtain the solvability in all dimensions of the second boundary value problem for a class of singular fourth-order Abreu type equations that arise from the approximation analysis of variational problems subject to convexity constraints.

AI.tldr: 建立了线性化蒙日-安培方程在散度形式下的局部和全局正则性估计，并应用于求解奇异四阶Abreu型方程的第二边值问题。
AI.motivation: 研究线性化蒙日-安培方程的正则性估计，这类方程在凸性约束变分问题的逼近分析中自然出现，特别是Abreu型四阶方程的第二边值问题求解需要此类估计。
AI.techniques: 通过线性化蒙日-安培算子的格林函数及其梯度的临界Lorentz空间估计来建立正则性估计，要求凸蒙日-安培势的海森行列式在两个正常数之间有界。
AI.main_theorems: 建立了线性化蒙日-安培方程在散度形式下的局部和全局正则性估计，并作为应用证明了在所有维度下一类奇异四阶Abreu型方程的第二边值问题的可解性。
AI.significance: 为凸性约束变分问题的逼近分析提供了重要工具，解决了奇异四阶方程的可解性问题，扩展了蒙日-安培方程理论在几何分析和变分问题中的应用。

title: Singular limit for a class of nonlocal conservation laws via compensated compactness
summary: We consider a class of nonlocal conservation laws modeling traffic flows, given by $ \partial_t u_\varepsilon + \partial_x(V(u_\varepsilon \ast γ_\varepsilon) u_\varepsilon) = 0$, with a rescaled convolution kernel $γ_\varepsilon(\cdot) := \varepsilon^{-1}γ(\cdot/\varepsilon)$. We establish the strong $\mathrm L^1_{\mathrm{loc}}$-convergence of weak solutions $u_\varepsilon$ toward the entropy-admissible solution of the corresponding local conservation law as the kernel $γ_\varepsilon$ concentrates to a Dirac delta distribution when $\varepsilon \searrow 0$. In contrast to previous literature, we obtain compactness of the family $\{u_\varepsilon \ast γ_\varepsilon\}_{\varepsilon>0}$ without relying on total variation bounds or Oleĭnik-type estimates. Instead, we establish $\mathrm L^2$-type bounds on its entropy production and use the theory of compensated compactness, assuming that the initial datum merely belongs to $\mathrm L^1\cap \mathrm L^\infty$. Our results are twofold. First, we establish the nonlocal-to-local limit for the piecewise constant kernel $γ(\cdot) := {1}_{[-1,0]}(\cdot)$ combined with the affine velocity function from Greenshields' traffic model. Second, we prove the limit for strictly monotone kernels along with decreasing velocity functions. These results settle a long-standing open problem concerning the nonlocal-to-local convergence for non-convex kernels.

AI.tldr: 建立了非局部守恒律到局部守恒律的强收敛性，解决了非凸核函数的非局部到局部收敛的长期开放问题
AI.motivation: 研究交通流建模中的非局部守恒律，当卷积核γ_ε集中到Dirac delta分布时，建立弱解u_ε向相应局部守恒律熵容许解的强收敛性
AI.techniques: 使用补偿紧致性理论，建立熵产生的L^2型估计，避免依赖全变差界或Oleĭnik型估计
AI.main_theorems: 1) 对分段常数核γ(·)=1_{[-1,0]}(·)结合Greenshields交通模型的仿射速度函数，建立非局部到局部极限；2) 对严格单调核结合递减速度函数，证明极限收敛
AI.significance: 解决了非凸核函数的非局部到局部收敛的长期开放问题，为交通流建模提供了重要的理论支撑，推广了补偿紧致性方法的应用范围

title: Spatial scale separation and emergent patterns in coupled diffusive-nondiffusive systems
summary: This paper investigates pattern formation in reaction-diffusion systems with both diffusive and nondiffusive components, establishing the existence of far-from-equilibrium patterns and providing necessary and sufficient conditions for diffusion-driven instability (DDI). In particular, we prove the existence of far-from-equilibrium patterns exhibiting branch-switching and discontinuities in the nondiffusive components, which cannot occur in classical reaction-diffusion equations. While previous work has linked DDI to instability in the purely nondiffusive subsystem -- thereby destabilizing all regular Turing patterns -- we show that DDI can also arise from subsystems involving nondiffusive and slow-diffusive components. This leads to simple sufficient conditions for DDI in systems with arbitrary numbers of components. Further, we fully classify all possible sources of DDI in the case of two diffusive and one nondiffusive component, illustrating our results with a receptor-based model supported by numerical bifurcation analysis and simulations. These findings extend the theoretical foundations of pattern formation, demonstrating how coupling between diffusive and nondiffusive dynamics can generate patterns beyond the reach of the classical reaction-diffusion framework.

AI.tldr: 该论文研究了具有扩散和非扩散组分的反应-扩散系统中的模式形成，建立了远离平衡态模式的存在性，并给出了扩散驱动不稳定性(DDI)的充要条件。
AI.motivation: 研究背景是经典反应-扩散系统在描述某些生物物理现象时的局限性，特别是当系统中同时存在扩散和非扩散组分时。核心问题是理解扩散与非扩散动力学耦合如何产生超出经典框架的模式形成机制。
AI.techniques: 使用的主要技术包括：分支理论、稳定性分析、数值分岔分析、模拟验证，以及对子系统（纯非扩散子系统、非扩散与慢扩散子系统）的详细分析。
AI.main_theorems: 主要结果：1) 证明了存在展现分支切换和非扩散组分不连续性的远离平衡态模式；2) 建立了DDI的充要条件；3) 发现DDI不仅源于纯非扩散子系统的不稳定性，还可源于非扩散与慢扩散子系统的耦合；4) 对两扩散一非扩散组分情况给出了DDI来源的完全分类。
AI.significance: 理论意义重大：扩展了模式形成的理论基础，揭示了扩散与非扩散动力学耦合产生新模式的可能性，为理解复杂生物系统中的模式形成提供了新视角，特别是对受体基模型等实际系统有重要应用价值。

title: Nonlinear scalar field equations with a critical Hardy potential
summary: We study the existence of solutions for the nonlinear scalar field equation $$-Δu - \frac{(N-2)^2}{4|x|^2} u = g(u), \quad \mbox{in } \mathbb{R}^N \setminus \{0\},$$ where the potential $-\frac{(N-2)^2}{4|x|^2}$ is the critical Hardy potential and $N \geq 3$. The nonlinearity $g$ is continuous and satisfies general subcritical growth assumptions of the Berestycki-Lions type. The problem is approached using variational methods within a non-standard functional setting. The natural energy functional associated with the equation is defined on the space $X^1(\mathbb{R}^N)$, which is the completion of $H^1(\mathbb{R}^N)$ with respect to the norm induced by the quadratic part of the functional. We establish the existence of a nontrivial solution $u_0 \in X^1(\mathbb{R}^N)$ that satisfies the Pohožaev constraint $\mathcal{M}$ and minimizes the energy functional on $\mathcal{M}$. Furthermore, assuming $g$ is odd, we prove the existence of at least one non-radial solution.

AI.tldr: 研究带临界Hardy势的非线性标量场方程解的存在性，在非标准函数空间中建立变分框架，证明非平凡解的存在性及非径向解的存在性。
AI.motivation: 研究带临界Hardy势 $-\\frac{(N-2)^2}{4|x|^2}$ 的非线性标量场方程解的存在性问题，该势函数在原点处具有奇异性，且是Hardy不等式中的临界指数，在变分框架下需要特殊的函数空间处理。
AI.techniques: 采用变分方法，在非标准函数空间 $X^1(\\mathbb{R}^N)$ 中建立能量泛函的框架，该空间是 $H^1(\\mathbb{R}^N)$ 关于泛函二次部分诱导范数的完备化；利用Pohožaev约束条件 $\mathcal{M}$ 和极小化方法。
AI.main_theorems: 1. 存在非平凡解 $u_0 \\in X^1(\\mathbb{R}^N)$ 满足Pohožaev约束 $\mathcal{M}$ 且在 $\mathcal{M}$ 上极小化能量泛函；2. 当 $g$ 为奇函数时，存在至少一个非径向解。
AI.significance: 扩展了Berestycki-Lions型非线性项在临界Hardy势情况下的解存在性理论，建立了处理奇异势函数的变分框架，为研究带奇异势的非线性椭圆方程提供了新方法。
